description: DOS 3.3 Memory Map and Page 3 Vectors
source: Inside the Apple IIe by Gary B. Little (1985)

symbols.name: DOS_WARM
symbols.description: JMP to DOS 3.3 warm start (reconnect DOS)

symbols.name: DOS_COLD
symbols.description: JMP to DOS 3.3 cold start (initialize DOS)

symbols.name: DOS_FM_PARAM
symbols.description: Load A(hi):Y(lo) with DOS 3.3 file manager parameter list address (Table 5-1)

symbols.name: DOS_RWTS_IOB
symbols.description: Load A(hi):Y(lo) with DOS 3.3 RWTS IOB parameter list address (Table 5-1)

symbols.name: DOS_RECONNECT
symbols.description: DOS 3.3 reconnect - accept new I/O links without destroying DOS state (Table 5-1)

symbols.name: BRK_VEC
symbols.description: Page 3: BRK vector - DOS 3.3 initializes to $FA59 (Table 5-2)

symbols.name: RESET_VEC
symbols.description: Page 3: RESET vector - DOS 3.3 initializes to $9DBF (Table 5-2)

symbols.name: USER_VEC
symbols.description: Page 3: USER vector - DOS 3.3 initializes to JMP $FF65 (Table 5-2)

symbols.name: NMI_VEC
symbols.description: Page 3: NMI vector - DOS 3.3 initializes to JMP $FF65 (Table 5-2)

symbols.name: IRQ_VEC
symbols.description: Page 3: IRQ vector - DOS 3.3 initializes to $FF65 (Table 5-2)
